# UniFi Mobility v0.4.2

## 中文

- 修复真实 Home Assistant 环境中旧流量实体 ID 未完成迁移的问题。
- 迁移现在直接读取当前配置项的实体注册表，仍会保留用户手动修改的实体 ID。

## English

- Fixes incomplete migration of legacy data-size entity IDs on a real Home
  Assistant installation.
- Migration now reads entities directly from the config entry registry while
  preserving user-customized entity IDs.
